task_details: Audit the most recent 7 plan files in storage_agents/plans/. The BREAKFAST slot should contain no items with category=PROTEIN (heavy meat/fish at breakfast is wrong for Israeli context). Replace any such items with category in {GRAIN, DAIRY, FRUIT}.
rationale: Current Israel local time is 17:11 IDT (outside 22-03 quiet window), so UI/feature_flagged tasks (3 HIGH/MEDIUM items in queue) are filtered out per window rule. Of the two remaining allowlisted data-fix tasks (both LOW), fix_meal_timing is picked over improve_variety by lexicographic task_id tiebreak (74... < 8b...). It is also a clean, atomic per-plan transformation that complements the variety fix run at 21:12 yesterday — keeping the recent build_reports diverse rather than running improve_variety twice in a row.
acceptance_criteria: BREAKFAST slot in each of the 7 most-recent storage_agents/plans/*.json files contains zero items with category=PROTEIN
Every replacement item has category in {GRAIN, DAIRY, FRUIT} and is drawn from the existing food catalog (no new foods added)
Total daily kcal per plan stays within +/-5% of the original

Original plan files are preserved (either via .bak copies or a new *_timing_fix.json variant alongside the originals, mirroring the 2026-05-26_17-23-19_timing_fix.json convention already present in storage_agents/plans/)
files_likely_to_change: storage_agents/plans/<7 most recent plan_*.json or dated plan files>
execution_hint: Run 'python3 -m nutrition_app.agents.task_executor --task-id 74edb64a-bd38-4235-8b8b-7119065530d5' first; if that path is not wired up for fix_meal_timing, fall back to a direct script that (1) globs storage_agents/plans/*.json sorted by mtime desc, takes top 7, (2) for each plan finds BREAKFAST items where category==PROTEIN, (3) selects a swap from the food catalog with category in {GRAIN,DAIRY,FRUIT} matching kcal +/-5%, (4) writes a sibling *_timing_fix.json. Use the Agent 3 (Food) catalog for lookups and Agent 4 (Inventory) only for availability sanity check; do NOT deduct inventory.
